author.bio: tech leading #libp2p at @protocollabs | engineer: fixer of some things; breaker of many | PMC @TheASF | biohacker, stoic, hiker, dogs
author.name: Raúl Kripalani

content.text:
I’m looking for a team or set of individual contributors _with protocol dexterity_, to help the @libp2p community design, build and ship a suite of conformance tests for libp2p implementations.

Go or Rust devs.

Know anybody? RT please.
